enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a
range of other risk categories too.
enriched_requirements.object: range of other risk categories too

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: upon issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions ((hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
enriched_requirements.object: India Financial Institutions ((hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) 'Bank Guarantee' shall mean financial and performance guarantees issued by
banks on behalf of their clients.
enriched_requirements.object: guarantees issued by banks on behalf of their clients

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) 'Bills Purchased and Discounted' shall mean negotiable instruments that give the
holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or determinable
future time.
enriched_requirements.object: give the holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or determinable future time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1[(iia) Committee on lending to related parties' shall mean a committee established
by the Board of the AIFI specifically to deal with lending to related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: by the Board of the AIFI specifically to deal with lending to related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs may
also identify any existing Committee, other than the Audit Committee, for this
purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: Committee, other than the Audit Committee, for this purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iib) 'Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: as specified in Section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iic) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of
the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iid) 'Director of an AIFI' or 'any other entity' shall mean a director appointed / elected
to the Board of the entity and would include a nominee director and an independent
director.
enriched_requirements.object: / elected to the Board of the entity and would include a nominee director and an independent director

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iie) 'Entity' in the context of a 'related party' shall mean a 'person' other than an
individual and a Hindu Undivided Family.
enriched_requirements.object: than an individual and a Hindu Undivided Family

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iif) 'Key Managerial Personnel (KMP)' of a AIFI shall have the same meaning as
defined in Section 2(51) of the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: as defined in Section 2(51) of the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iig) 'Lending' in the context of a 'related party' shall mean extending funded or/ and
non-fund-based credit facilities to related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: and non-fund-based credit facilities to related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While investments in debt
instruments of related parties shall be covered for this purpose, equity investments
shall be excluded.]
enriched_requirements.object: purpose, equity investments shall be excluded

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) 'Letter of Credit (LC)' shall mean any arrangement how so ever named or
described, that is irrevocable and thereby constitutes a definite undertaking of the
issuing bank to honour a complying presentation.
enriched_requirements.object: so ever named or described, that is irrevocable and thereby constitutes a definite undertaking of the issuing bank to honour

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2[(iiia) 'Person' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 3(23) of
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 3(23) of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iiib) 'Personal Loan' shall have the same meaning as defined under Banking
Statistics (Harmonised Definitions)
enriched_requirements.object: as defined under Banking Statistics (Harmonised Definitions)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iiic) 'Promoter' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of
the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iiid) 'Reciprocally Related Person' means an individual who is either (i) a director
(excluding independent director / Nominee director appointed by the Government or
2Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: either (i) a director (excluding independent director / Nominee director appointed by the Government or 2Inserted with effect fro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iiie) Related Party' with respect to an AIFI shall mean a related person, a reciprocally
related person, or any of the following entities:
enriched_requirements.object: a reciprocally related person, or any of the following entities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, nothing in sub-clause (e) above shall apply in cases where the authority to
nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided further that, nothing in sub-clause (f) above shall apply to the advice, directions
or instructions given in a professional capacity.
enriched_requirements.object: directions or instructions given in a professional capacity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, Government of India / State Government-owned or controlled
entities shall not be treated as related parties to a AIFI just by virtue of the fact that the
Government has the common ownership or control of such entities.
enriched_requirements.object: parties to a AIFI just by virtue of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iiif) 'Related Person' with respect to an AIFI shall mean a person, and the relatives of
such a person, where the person:
enriched_requirements.object: the relatives of such a person

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) 3['Relative' with regard to a natural person shall have the same meaning as defined
in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein.]
4[(iva) 'Specified employees' mean all employees of an AIFI who are positioned up to two
levels below the Board and any employee designated as such as per the AIFI's policy.]
enriched_requirements.object: as defined in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) 5[Substantial interest' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 5(ne)
of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.]
(2) All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of
3Substituted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 5(ne) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or
re-enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank, or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.

6[An AIFI shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk Management

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall, inter-alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, legal entity identifier (LEI), filing of security interest, and restrictions on
revolving credit facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: related to lending to related parties, legal entity identifier (LEI), filing of security interest, and restrictions on rev

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Credit assessments carried out by a AIFI shall suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
7 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to obviate the possibility of conflict of interest in the lending operations of
the AIFIs, an AIFI shall not:
(1) enter into any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of:
enriched_requirements.object: any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, till the director relinquishes the directorship of either the AIFI or the
company, the AIFI shall not further renew such a facility on or after its contracted maturity
9Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: facility on or after its contracted maturity 9Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Fina

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate
charged to the employees.
enriched_requirements.object: rate charged to the employees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his / her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or
higher value.
enriched_requirements.object: cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of
derivative transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: be mandatory in exposures arising on account of derivative transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of an AIFI, as required in terms of
the extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall
<image>
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees'
of the AIFI and their relatives.
enriched_requirements.object: for lending to 'specified employees' of the AIFI and their relatives
the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns abo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: loans towards related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: to a single related party and a group of related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: prudential exposure limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of this Chapter of these
Directions, or which have been exempted from prescribed prohibitions in these
Directions, except (i) credit facilities fully secured by cash or liquid securities and
in accordance to prescribed LTV and valuation norms for such securities and (ii)
Interbank loans, shall be subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy,
which shall not be higher than the following ceilings:
Asset Size (in ₹ crore) Materiality Threshold Ceilings
> 10,00,000 ₹25 crore
≥ 1,00,000 to up to 10,00,000 ₹10 crore
Less than 100,000 ₹5 crore
Asset size based on the last audited balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: following ceilings: Asset Size (in ₹ crore) Materiality Threshold Ceilings > 10,00,000 ₹25 crore ≥ 1,00,000 to up to 10,00,000 ₹10

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For loans, materiality threshold shall apply at individual transaction level.
enriched_requirements.object: level

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loan to related parties and
borrowers as per the AIFI's policy.
enriched_requirements.object: of loan to related parties and borrowers as per the AIFI's policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned either by the
Board or the 'Committee on Lending to Related Parties' of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: the Board or the 'Committee on Lending to Related Parties' of the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loans sanctioned by the AIFI to such related persons and related parties.
enriched_requirements.object: suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Credit facilities sanctioned to 'specified employees' and their relatives shall be
reported to the Board on an annual basis.
enriched_requirements.object: Board on an annual basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
enriched_requirements.object: or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: Audit Committee of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the AIFI or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
enriched_requirements.object: lending to related party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve
<image>
Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve <image> Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of
full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It is advised that AIFIs shall ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate
exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks
(excluding Regional Rural Banks), Local Area Banks, Small Finance Banks, and
Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial
Institutions and NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes.
enriched_requirements.object: with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional Rural Ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'Exposure' for this purpose shall include all fund based and non-fund
based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Aggregate sanctioned limit or outstanding balance, whichever is higher, shall be
reckoned for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Lenders shall ascertain the position of aggregate
exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of
Information on Large Credits (CRILC) database or declaration obtained from the
borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of Information on Large Credits (C

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit (LOU)
shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal /
enhancement of any existing exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, Departments / Agencies of Central
and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under Companies
Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be exempted from
this provision.
enriched_requirements.object: provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as well
as all subsidiaries and associates.
enriched_requirements.object: obtain LEI for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In India, LEI code may be obtained from Legal
Entity Identifier India Ltd (LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India
Limited (CCIL), which has been recognised by the Reserve Bank as issuer of LEI
under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007 and is accredited by the GLEIF
as the Local Operating Unit (LOU) in India for issuance and management of LEI.
enriched_requirements.object: Entity Identifier India Ltd (LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL), which has been recognise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After obtaining LEI code, an AIFI shall also ensure that borrowers renew the codes
as per GLEIF guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: renew the codes as per GLEIF guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The records
maintained by the Central Registry shall be available for search by any lender or any
other person desirous of dealing with the property.
enriched_requirements.object: by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry.
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to extend working capital finance, unless
specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: working capital finance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall be permitted to extend working capital when banks are
not in a position to meet the credit requirements of the counterparty concerned on
account of temporary liquidity constraints.
enriched_requirements.object: working capital when banks are not in a position to meet the credit requirements of the counterparty concerned on account of te

conditions:
in case of a counterparty whose working capital is financed
under multiple banking arrangement (MBAs)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of a counterparty whose working capital is financed
under multiple banking arrangement (MBAs), the AIFI shall obtain an auditor's
certificate indicating the extent of funds already borrowed, before considering the
request for further working capital finance.
enriched_requirements.object: indicating the extent of funds already borrowed, before considering the request for further working capital finance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to extend revolving underwriting facility to Short
Term Floating Rate Notes / Bonds or Debentures issued by companies.
enriched_requirements.object: revolving underwriting facility to Short Term Floating Rate Notes / Bonds or Debentures issued by companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications
in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
